eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Kansas; at 6:43 PM on JUL 11, 2026 Effective until 6:43 PM JUL 12, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is an Amber Alert: We have just received the following information from the Kansas City Kansas Police Department, regarding a possible child abduction. Law Enforcement is looking for a 2020 gray Honda Accord  with Kansas License Tag 3 3 6 2 A J H the car also has a sunroof. 
The Suspect is believed to be: Taylyn Reed, 29 year old black female with brown eyes and black hair. Taylyn Reed is 5'7", 220 lbs last seen wearing white t-shirt and black pants she wears a shoulder length hairstyle that is curly. The Victims are: Adrian Boose, 3 months old black male with brown eyes and black hair. Adrian Boose is 1'0", 15 lbs and was last seen at 4809 Locust Ave Kansas City Kansas wearing a blue and white onsey. Jaylen Boose, 3 year old black male with brown eyes and black hair. Jaylen Boose is 3'0", 45 lbs and was last seen at 4809 Locust Ave in Kansas City Kansas wearing a blue Paw Patrol Pajama pants and no shirt. If you have any information on the location of: Adrian Boose, Jaylen Boose,  please call 9 1 1 immediately. Other tips may be shared by calling 1 800 K S CRIME. We repeat the suspect Vehicle is a: 2020 gray Honda Accord License Tag 3362AJH the car also has a sunroof. 
This is the picture of the actual car.
